calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Tam in Propria Persona.
Rebecca Tam in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the petition was continued to today in light of Rebecca's objection and for her objection to be filed by today. Ms. Tam stated that she sent an e-mail to her Brother and got no response, and that if he is not going to be true to his word with regard to not taking any fees, she will do nothing. The Court granted the First and Final Report and Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rebecca Tam in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Tam stated that her Brother wrote in an e-mail that he was not taking Executor's fees and that she wants to know why he is taking them now. The Court informed Ms. Tam that she needs to file her objections. The First Account and Report, etc. is continued to July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Warren Tam in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for probate, that there is a concern raised that there is only proof of one subscribing witness and that the signature is different than that on the will. Mr. Tam reported that at the time she signed the will she was not married to his brother, that it is the same person, that he was there at the signing, that he agrees that the signature looks different and confirmed that the other witnesses are still living. The Court stated that it might be helpful to get statements from the other witnesses. The petition for probate of will and letters testamentary was continued to August 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and Mr. Tam is to submit the proof of subscribing witness no later that July 28, 2016.

After the hearing Mr. Tam asked for the matter to be recalled as Ms. Ko had arrived. The Court stated that it will wait for the additional documents.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
